description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular, natural shape and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin is predominantly a blend of red and yellow hues, with a mottled pattern that gives it a realistic, fresh appearance. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way that suggests a waxy, firm exterior. Subtle color gradients and speckles are visible, especially where the red transitions into lighter yellow areas. The apple appears plump and ripe, with no visible blemishes or damage. Its size and coloration are typical of common apple varieties found in urban markets or parks.
description: A round, glossy apple with red and yellow mottled skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Front view shows a mostly red surface with a visible stem and subtle yellow patches.
description_view_1: This angle highlights more yellow on the upper left, with the stem angled right.
description_view_2: The apple appears slightly more oblong, with the stem curving downward and more red visible.
description_view_3: View shows the stem curving left, with a balanced mix of red and yellow skin.
